allow: Bash(mysql -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS mediconnect CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

Bash(/c/xampp2/mysql/bin/mysql -u root --password="" -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS mediconnect CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")
Bash(/c/xampp2/mysql/bin/mysql -u root -ppassword -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS mediconnect CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci; SHOW DATABASES;")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; logs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); errors=[l for l in logs if l.get\('type'\) in \('error','warning'\)]; print\(json.dumps\(errors[-30:], indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; logs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); recent=[l for l in logs[-50:] if 'error' in l.get\('type',''\).lower\(\) or 'error' in l.get\('text',''\).lower\(\)[:100]]; [print\(l['type'],'|',l['text'][:300]\) for l in recent[-20:]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; logs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(l.get\('type',''\),'|',str\(l.get\('text',''\)\)[:200]\) for l in logs[-30:]]")
